releases.title: Auto-generate release notes from git log via build script
changes: Added scripts/generate-releases.js: reads git history, extracts
Frontend now fetches releases.json at startup instead of hardcoded array
npm run releases / npm run build regenerates the file
Committed releases.json so Docker/production serves it without git

releases.title: Add automatic image compression for Claude Vision API 5MB limit
changes: Add automatic image compression for Claude Vision API 5MB limit

releases.title: Improve extraction accuracy, add AI summary, debug copy, and server cleanup
changes: Improve extraction accuracy, add AI summary, debug copy, and server cleanup

releases.title: Add version badge, release notes popup, and version history
changes: Clickable version badge (v1.5.0) in header opens release notes modal
Full version history with timestamps for all 5 releases
Modal popup with styled release entries: version tag, date, title, changes
Click outside or X button to close modal
Bumped package.json version to 1.5.0

releases.title: Add multi-file upload and data extraction features
changes: Backend accepts up to 20 files via multer.array()
Frontend supports selecting/dropping multiple files at once
Each file converted to pages independently, merged into single page list
Source filename tracked per page for display
New POST /api/extract endpoint sends document pages to Claude with
Per-type extraction prompts for all 12 document types (ID card fields,
Frontend "Extract Data" button processes all grouped documents sequentially
Extraction results displayed as field/value cards per document
Full debug logging of extraction API calls and responses

releases.title: Add ID card appendix (נספח) and vehicle license (רישיון רכב) document types
changes: ID_CARD_APPENDIX: the folded paper appendix (Sefach) listing family
VEHICLE_LICENSE: vehicle registration/ownership certificate, distinct
Updated classification prompt with clearer descriptions for Claude
Added Hebrew labels, icons, and badge colors for both new types

releases.title: Fix classification error for JPEG uploads
changes: Pass actual media type (image/jpeg, image/png, etc.) from upload to
Surface detailed API error messages in the frontend debug panel
The Claude API requires the correct media_type for base64 images

releases.title: Add CI/CD pipeline, Dockerfile, and Render deployment config
changes: GitHub Actions workflow: build check + Docker image verification
Dockerfile with system deps for pdf-to-img canvas support
render.yaml blueprint for one-click Render deployment
Health check endpoint at GET /health

releases.title: Add loan document classifier POC
changes: Express backend with PDF-to-image conversion (pdf-to-img)
Claude Vision API integration for document classification
Dark-themed frontend with drag-and-drop upload
Page classification with color-coded badges and Hebrew labels
Document grouping by detected boundaries
Debug panel with timestamps and raw API responses
